home.welcomeSubtitle: Sign in to see loops from the people you follow.
home.title: Home
home.subtitle: Loops from the people you follow.

discovery.title: Discover
discovery.subtitle: Wander the network. Find your people.
discovery.verifiedOnlyHint: Showing only videos with ProofMode verification

messages.title: Direct messages
messages.subtitle: Talk to support, slide a loop privately, or keep a thread going with the people you follow.
messages.shareWithLink: Your next message will include a vine link.
messages.signerUnsupported: Your current signer can log you in, but it doesn't speak NIP-44 yet. Switch to an nsec, bunker, or another signer with NIP-44 support to use DMs here.
messages.supportSummary: Bugs, moderation, account stuff — we're listening.

support.title: Support
support.subtitle: Need a hand? We've got you.
support.helpCenterDescription: Answers to the stuff people usually ask.
support.messageSupportDescription: Slide into our DMs right inside Divine — encrypted with NIP-17.
support.contactDescription: Open a ticket and we'll get back to you as fast as we can.
support.githubDescription: Report bugs, request features, or poke around our GitHub.
support.communityDescription: Come hang with the Divine community on Nostr.
support.communityBody: Divine runs on Nostr, the decentralized social protocol. Find us on your favorite Nostr client.

categoriesPage.title: Categories
categoriesPage.subtitle: Loops, sorted by vibe.
categoriesPage.metaDescription: Explore video categories on Divine - comedy, music, dance, animals, sports, food, and more.

dialog.description: Details about this video's archive origin, Proofmode data, AI scan status, and hosting source.
dialog.archiveBlurb: This video is an original Vine recovered from the Internet Archive.
dialog.archiveContext: Before Vine shut down in 2017, ArchiveTeam and the Internet Archive preserved millions of Vines. This content is part of that recovery effort.
dialog.archiveLearnMore: Learn more about the Vine archive preservation

intro.proofMode: This video's authenticity is verified using Proofmode technology.
intro.aiHumanDivine: This video is hosted on Divine and AI detection indicates it is likely human-made, even though no ProofMode verification data is attached.
intro.aiHuman: AI detection indicates this video is likely human-made, though no ProofMode verification data is attached.
intro.unverifiedDivine: This video is unverified. It is hosted on Divine, but no ProofMode verification data is attached yet.
intro.unverifiedExternal: This video is unverified and hosted outside Divine. It does not include ProofMode verification data.

summary.platinum: Platinum: Device hardware attestation, cryptographic signatures, Content Credentials (C2PA), and AI scan confirms human origin.
summary.gold: Gold: Captured on a real device with hardware attestation, cryptographic signatures, and Content Credentials (C2PA).
summary.silverProof: Silver: Cryptographic signatures prove this video hasn't been altered since recording.
summary.bronze: Bronze: Basic metadata signatures are present.
summary.silverAi: Silver: AI scan confirms this video is likely human-created.
summary.muted: No verification data available for this video.

classicViners.heading: Classic Viners
classicViners.archivedTooltip: Original Vine archive preserved from the Internet Archive
